base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of msx_tileset_full — a tile (tile_atlas) from 1986 dragon quest. MSX overworld + cave + town tileset — compact atlas. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: MSX overworld + cave + town tileset — compact atlas; 179×144 RGBA canvas. All terrain types represented in lower color-depth MSX palette
